title: Sysco Is Thriving In This Tough Inflationary Environment
text: US food service distributor Sysco is one of the few stocks that has gone up significantly year to date. As restaurants seek efficiencies in this inflationary environment, they are increasingly turning to Sysco.

title: Sysco to Release Fourth Quarter and Fiscal Year 2022 Financial Results on August 9
text: HOUSTON, July 19, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Sysco Corporation (NYSE:SYY) will host a conference call and webcast to discuss its fourth quarter and fiscal year 2022 financial results at 10 a.m. EDT on Tuesday, Aug. 9, 2022.

title: Why Sysco (SYY) is a Top Value Stock for the Long-Term

title: 7 Safe Dividends Stocks to Buy in July
text: Rising interest rates and talk of an upcoming recession have investors seeking safety in their portfolios with high dividend-paying stocks. The post 7 Safe Dividends Stocks to Buy in July appeared first on InvestorPlace.

title: 3 Recession-Proof Stocks Up 10% in 2022 to Buy Right Now
text: Today, we dive into three stocks that are poised to beat inflation and rise above any possible recession. All three names appear worth buying for the second half of 2022 and might be up for consideration as buy-and-hold stocks.

title: Food distributor Sysco accuses 4 largest beef processors of price fixing
text: OMAHA, Neb. — The nation's largest food distributor has joined other businesses accusing the four largest meat processors of working together to inflate beef prices.
